Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-EIC Reject
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Total time between SW-Awaiting EIC Decision and SW-EIC Reject
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-EIC Reject to be performed after SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-EIC Reject in variants that include SW-Reviewer Agreed followed by SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-EIC Reject in the variant ending with SW-EIC Reject after initial submission
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Average waiting time to the SW-EIC Reject after the last reviewer activity (e.g., SW-Reviewer Agreed or SW-Reviewer No Response)
Metric: the average of the duration between the first time instant when `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' or `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-Reviewer No Response' and the last time instant when `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Average time it takes SW-EIC Reject to occur after SW-AE Recommendation overdue
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Recommendation overdue' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Time from SW-Checklist Completed to SW-EIC Reject in variants with frequency greater than 1
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Total time for SW-EIC Reject in the context of the ACM journal’s standard pre-review screening phase, as reflected in short-length variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Average time for SW-EIC Reject grouped by case:concept:name
Elapsed time between SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion and SW-EIC Reject in cases where no revision was requested
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion'", 'end': "activity == 'SW-EIC Reject'", 'aggregation': 'total', 'filter': "activity != 'SW-EIC Major Revision' and activity != 'SW-EIC Minor Revision' and activity != 'SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit'"}"

Name: Time of SW-EIC Reject relative to the initial Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation in rejection-only pathways
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'", 'end': "activity == 'SW-EIC Reject'", 'aggregation': 'total', 'filter': "activity != 'SW-EIC Major Revision' and activity != 'SW-EIC Minor Revision' and activity != 'SW-EIC Accept' and activity != 'SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit'"}"

Name: Minimum time between SW-Initial Reviewer Selection and SW-EIC Reject in variants that do not involve any revision cycle
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'", 'end': "activity == 'SW-EIC Reject'", 'aggregation': 'minimum', 'filter': "activity != 'SW-EIC Major Revision' and activity != 'SW-EIC Minor Revision' and activity != 'SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit'"}"

Name: Total time from Plagiarism Originality Report Completed to SW-EIC Reject in direct rejection trajectories
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed'", 'end': "activity == 'SW-EIC Reject'", 'aggregation': 'total', 'filter': "activity != 'SW-EIC Major Revision' and activity != 'SW-EIC Minor Revision' and activity != 'SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit'"}"

Name: Elapsed time between SW-AE Assign Reviewers and SW-EIC Reject in cases where all assigned reviewers either declined or provided no response
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'", 'end': "activity == 'SW-EIC Reject'", 'aggregation': 'total', 'filter': "activity == 'SW-Reviewer Declined' or activity == 'SW-Reviewer No Response'"}"
